publishedAbstract: - The OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) Client operator upgrade hangs and remains in the `installing` or `Failed` state.- The `ocs-client-operator-console` pod fails to start, getting stuck in the `Init` or `CrashLoopBackOff` state.- The operator status displays a timeout error: ~~~ install failed: deployment ocs-client-operator-controller-manager not ready before timeout: deployment "ocs-client-operator-controller-manager" exceeded its progress deadline ~~~- The `ocs-client-operator-console` pod logs show the following certificate loading error: ~~~ [emerg] 1#1: cannot load certificate "/var/serving-cert/tls.crt": BIO_new_file() failed (SSL: error:80000002:system library::No such file or directory:calling fopen(/var/serving-cert/tls.crt, r) error:10000080:BIO routines::no such file) ~~~
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation Client upgrade hangs with ocs-client-operator-console pod in CrashLoopBackOff due to missing certificate
